title: Negra Star
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Negra Star''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] which served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Some captured [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] technical staff were being transferred to the ''Negra Star'' and the Nebulon-B frigate [[Warspite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Warspite'']] for transportation to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] mounted a rescue operation and sent a lone [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], to identify which [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] were carrying the Sullustans and to disable them. Farlander then fought [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] launched from the nearby frigates while Rebel transports rescued the prisoners.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
